title: taraxacum continium
intro: Taraxacum continium, also known as the common dandelion, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum continium include its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with consuming Taraxacum continium include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion. Taraxacum continium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and its roots and leaves can be used in herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves.
